title: REACH OUT OREGON - 211info
text: NORTH OFFICE REACH OUT OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a parent warmline offering peer support and connections to local resources, including one-to-one support, resource navigation, support groups, training, and advocacy. 7110 SW Fir Loop Suite 160 Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Parents and caregivers raising children and youth with emotional, mental, behavioral, or other health needs Hours: Reach Out Oregon: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm. Closed holidays. Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (833) 732-2467 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (833) 732-2467 Call or Text Reach Out Oregon Alternate (541) 509-8139 Office Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or text Reach Out Oregon for referral and connection support. Visit website for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Clatsop, Columbia, Gilliam, Hood River, Morrow, Multnomah, Sherman, Tillamook, Umatilla, Union, Wallowa, Wasco, and Washington Counties Services: Advocacy * Disabilities Issues Family Support Centers/Outreach Health/Disability Related Support Groups Mental Health Information/Education Parent Support Groups Parent Support Groups * Autism Spectrum Disorder Parent to Parent Networking Parent to Parent Networking * Autism Spectrum Disorder Parent to Parent Networking * Disabilities Issues Parenting Helplines Parenting Materials * Disabilities Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Disabilities Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTH OFFICE
